sub_modules.fp_hp_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that maps FIR tap indices to the exact 101 binary32 high-pass coefficients.
sub_modules.fp32_mul: Combinational IEEE-754 binary32 multiplier for tap sample and coefficient products.
sub_modules.fp32_add: Combinational IEEE-754 binary32 adder used to form the FIR accumulation chain.
